description: The WorldGrabMover component is used as a visual for the grab world locomotion.

fields.ShowLerp: The lerp value for showing the visual.
fields._activatingUser: The user making this visual for grabbing onto the world.
fields._crossMesh: The cross mesh being used for the anchor visual.
fields._visualVisible: Whether the visual should be visible.
fields._visualRotation: The field to drive with the rotation for the visual.
fields._material: The material that the visual is using.
fields._referencePosition: the position this visual is trying to stay and anchor at.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
